waves.description: Contract Freeze / Scaffold - Scaffold the two TypeScript contract files to prove fresh ACPX execution

work_packets.title: Scaffold mission_types.ts contract
acceptance_criteria: src/contracts/mission_types.ts contains minimal TypeScript interfaces for mission types
File is syntactically valid TypeScript with no import/export errors
Interfaces cover basic mission definition needed for ACPX execution proof
File is importable by other modules in the worker workspace

scaffold_exists:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
missing = [rel for rel in paths if not Path(rel).is_file()]
if missing:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing={missing}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_contract_tokens:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
required = ('export ', 'interface ', 'type ', 'enum ')
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in required):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_contract_tokens={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_schema_surface:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
surface_tokens = (
    'Schema',
    'schema',
    'export interface ',
    'export type ',
    'export const ',
)
invalid = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if not any(token in text for token in surface_tokens):
        invalid.append(rel)
if invalid:
    sys.stderr.write(f'missing_schema_surface={invalid}\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_lint_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import sys
paths = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
issues = []
for rel in paths:
    text = Path(rel).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    lines = text.splitlines()
    trailing = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if line.rstrip() != line]
    tabs = [idx + 1 for idx, line in enumerate(lines) if '\t' in line]
    if trailing:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:trailing_whitespace={trailing}')
    if tabs:
        issues.append(f'{rel}:tabs={tabs}')
    if text and not text.endswith('\n'):
        issues.append(f'{rel}:missing_terminal_newline')
if issues:
    sys.stderr.write('lint_smoke_failed=' + ';'.join(issues) + '\n')
    raise SystemExit(1)
typescript_import_smoke:
from pathlib import Path
import subprocess
import sys
targets = ['src/contracts/mission_types.ts']
import_smoke_path = Path('src/contracts/import_smoke.ts')
import_smoke_path.write_text("import * as contract_1 from './mission_types';\nvoid [contract_1];\n", encoding='utf-8')
command = [
    'tsc',
    '--noEmit',
    '--target', 'es2022',
    '--module', 'esnext',
    '--moduleResolution', 'bundler',
    '--skipLibCheck',
    *targets,
    import_smoke_path.as_posix(),
]
raise SystemExit(subprocess.run(command, check=False).returncode)

work_packets.builder_prompt: Create a minimal TypeScript contract file at src/contracts/mission_types.ts. Define interfaces for mission types including a Mission interface with minimal required fields (id, status, createdAt). Export all types. Keep scope narrow - this is a scaffold for fresh ACPX execution proof only.
